title: Hikari Tsuneki, Chapter 1: Decision
overview: Shoichi is an average guy who has trouble visualizing his future. When he sees how far ahead of him his classmate, Hikari, is in every facet of life, he makes a decision.

title: Hikari Tsuneki, Chapter 2: Deep in the Mountains
overview: The girl who climbed in through Shoichi's window wasn't a ghost, but his classmate Hikari. Her appearance at the summer course rejuvenates him.

title: Hikari Tsuneki, Chapter 3: In the Men's Bath
overview: Shoichi and Hikari spend more time together during the summer course and eventually end up in the men's bath together after he incorrectly calls her bluff.

title: Hikari Tsuneki, Final Chapter: Starry Sky
overview: Hikari continues to ignore Shoichi after their moment at the pool, leading him to suspect he did something wrong.

title: Tooru Miyamae, Chapter 1: Trade
overview: Shoichi and his two friends have been playing video games during class and talk about it has been spreading across the school. Eventually, a girl noticed them playing and enjoyed playing with them. She was secretly into video games as well. The four of them later go into town and play some karaoke and arcades.

title: Tooru Miyamae, Chapter 2: Versus
overview: Two childhood friends duel out there differences over a game of GusGal.

title: Tooru Miyamae, Chapter 3: Brother Complex
overview: Shouichi was invited to Miyamae's place to play some GusGal, but instead, they talked a lot more and she began to open up to him.

title: Tooru Miyamae, Final Chapter: Fluffy
overview: Previously Miyamae asked Shouichi to come with her to ComiMa, a fashion and gaming convention. Now along with Shiori's custom cosplay outfits and Tomoe, all four of them go and try to sell some of their creations. After a long day, they go to dinner and ran into a classmate that happened to work there.

title: Kyouko Tono, Chapter 1: Home Ec Club
overview: A new arc kicks off, as Shoichi and Kyoko both struggle to come to terms with each other's growing up.

title: Kyouko Tono, Chapter 2: Hand-Me-Down
overview: Shoichi is spurred on by various events happening around him to ask Kyoko out on a Christmas Eve date.

title: Kyouko Tono, Chapter 3: Awakening
overview: Shoichi and Kyoko agree to remain friends forever, but Ikuo's stirring display of bravery awakens something within Shoichi.

title: Kyouko Tono, Final Chapter: First Love
overview: Shoichi, having decided to go out in a blaze of glory, lays it all on the line to tell Kyoko how he really feels.
